item.description:
The GAA @officialgaa · 10min "We're very excited to get going..."
Strong spirit in the @OfficialWexGAA camp as Lee Chin highlights the impact of fresh talent and looks ahead to the @gaaleinster Senior Hurling Championship. 3 853
